sections.paragraph:
Original: תּחשׁ

Transliteration: tachash

Phonetic: takh'-ash

BDB Definition:

  1. a kind of leather, skin, or animal hide
    1. perhaps the animal yielding the skin
      1. perhaps the badger or dugong, dolphin, or sheep

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: 2503

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
